title: Earn2Trade vs Tradeify (2026): Pick Your Endgame vs Pick Your Restriction
description: Earn2Trade runs one rule archetype across GAU + TCP with two post-eval finish lines — LiveSim default (94.77% of 2025 passers stayed) or optional Live capital. Tradeify runs three distinct programs with inverted consistency rules — Growth eval-free/35%-funded, Select 40%-eval/no-funded, Lightning instant-funded progressive 20-25-30%. Pick your endgame (Earn2Trade) vs pick your restriction (Tradeify). Different lock families on top. Honest 2026 side-by-side.

og.title: Earn2Trade vs Tradeify (2026): Pick Your Endgame vs Pick Your Restriction
og.description: One archetype with two finish lines vs three programs that argue with themselves on consistency. Same EOD trail, opposite lock families, opposite decision-timing.
